prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约10504→6514→6181→3528→2599，呈持续前移趋势，近4年累计前移约7905名，2025年基准约2599名，竞争逐年加剧；本省理科（物理类）计划2021年67人→2022年53人→2023年54人→2024年55人→2025年51人，2026年计划44人，较2025年缩招约13.7%，招生名额减少使竞争进一步 加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第50名持续上升至2026年第43名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2026年声誉 数据中该校未出现明显负面事件；抖音热度排名第27位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度升温；未见历史投档断档记录；控制科学与工程获评A级 （第五轮学科评估），为该校唯一A类学科，与自动化类、电子信息类等招生专业高度关联，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、 电气工程等该校核心招生专业大类社会热度持续偏高（2024年均为高热推荐/推荐）；内蒙古2026年考生总数约154000人，较2025年（约116360人）大幅增长约32%，按历史比例估 算物理类考生约110880人（+32.5%），考生规模显著扩大加剧竞争；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，属东北地区，对内蒙古考生有 一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划缩招约13.7%、本省考生总数大幅增长约32%以及 学校排名稳步提升等多重因素，2026年竞争预计进一步加剧。预测最低位次约2615名，区间2223–3007名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（兴海领军班）
- 通信工程（兴海领军班）
- 软件工程（国家特软创新班）
- 飞行器设计与工程（兴海领军班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类（含自动化、电气工程及其自动化等）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、通信工程、光电信息科学与工程）
- 海洋工程类（含船舶与海洋工程等）
- 核工程与核技术
- 航空航天类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2223–3007名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<2223名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（计算机、通信等兴 海领军班）；位次接近区间上限（>3007名）应以三档专业为主确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 10504 → 6514 → 6181 → 3528 → 2599, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward movement of about 7905 places in the past 4 years. The 2025 baseline is about 2599, and competition is intensifying year by year. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 67 in 2021 → 53 in 2022 → 54 in 2023 → 55 in 2024 → 51 in 2025, with a 2026 plan of 44, a reduction of about 13.7% compared to 2025. The reduction in enrollment places further intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; the main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has continuously risen from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In the 2026 reputation data, no significant negative incidents were observed for this university. Douyin popularity ranking is 27th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention in applications. No historical record of admission gaps. Control Science and Engineering was rated A (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A-class discipline at this university, highly related to enrollment majors such as Automation and Electronic Information, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment major categories such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering at this university have consistently high social popularity (all were high-heat recommendations/recommended in 2024). The total number of Inner Mongolia candidates in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 116,360). Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that physics category candidates are about 110,880 (+32.5%), with a significant expansion in candidate scale intensifying competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, in the Northeast region, which has a certain regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, a reduction of about 13.7% in the 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 32% in the total number of provincial candidates, and the steady improvement in the university's ranking, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2615, with a range of 2223–3007.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (Xinghai Leading Class)
- Communication Engineering (Xinghai Leading Class)
- Software Engineering (National Special Software Innovation Class)
- Aircraft Design and Engineering (Xinghai Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Ocean Engineering (including Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, etc.)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology
- Aerospace.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Energy and Power (including Energy and Power Engineering, Marine Engineering)
- Underwater Acoustics Engineering (including Electronic Underwater Acoustics, Underwater Acoustics, Ocean Information)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Double Degree Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2223–3007, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2223), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer, Communication, etc., Xinghai Leading Class); if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3007), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 2477 → 2604 → 2082 → 1571, showing a forward trend in recent 3 years, with a baseline of about 1571 in 2025; the provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 9 in 2022 → 9 in 2023 → 8 in 2024 → 14 in 2025, and 18 in 2026, an increase of about 28.6% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition due to increased admission slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 43rd in the Soft Science main ranking, with a continuous rise in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength; no significant negative events were found in the 2026 reputation data; ranked 27th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), indicating high application attention; the university is primarily engineering-oriented, with no directly corresponding A-class disciplines supporting liberal arts majors, making liberal arts programs relatively less attractive.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has a relatively hot social popularity (recommended), while Business Administration major shows divided social popularity with a wait-and-see attitude; the total number of examinees in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025, with an estimated 43,120 history category examinees (+32.1%), intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, which has a certain regional appeal to Inner Mongolia examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of historical rankings, the approximately 28.6% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, and the roughly 32% increase in the total number of provincial examinees, the expansion eases competition but the increase in examinees intensifies it, roughly offsetting each other. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1825, with a range of 1551–2099.
